name: ACMA:GAME
overview: It is said that if you collect 99 devil's keys, you can have ‍everything in the world. Driven by desire, players risk their lives in the deadly ACMA:GAME. Desperate to trace down who killed his father, Teruasa must put his brains to the ultimate test as the psychological warfare begins.

trailers.title: 『劇場版ACMA：GAME　最後の鍵』ティザー特報【10/25(金)公開】
